LanguageData.VEE_AnimalPodCrash.label: animal transport pod crash
LanguageData.VEE_BattleAnimalsWanderIn.label: battle animals wander in
LanguageData.VEE_CaravanAnimalsWanderIn.label: caravan animals wander in
LanguageData.VEE_Cargopodsapparel.label: cargo pods (apparel)
LanguageData.VEE_Cargopodsweapons.label: cargo pods (weapons)
LanguageData.VEE_CropSprout.label: crop sprout
LanguageData.VEE_Drought.label: drought
LanguageData.VEE_Drought.letterText: An unusual drought has set in.\n\nDrought is devastating for plant life and will quickly prevent all the crops not planted in hydroponics or high fertility soil to grow.
LanguageData.VEE_Earthquake.label: earthquake
LanguageData.VEE_HailStorm.label: hail storm
LanguageData.VEE_HailStorm.letterText: A freak, small scale hail storm is ravaging the local area. Any person or creature not hiding under the roof risks getting injured by ice pellets. Get some blunt resistant armour!
LanguageData.VEE_HuntingParty.label: hunting party
LanguageData.VEE_MeteoriteShower.label: meteorite shower
LanguageData.VEE_MeteoriteShower.letterText: Several large meteorites have struck ground in the area. They left behind large lumps of resources.
LanguageData.VEE_ShuttleCrash.label: shuttle crash
LanguageData.VEE_SpaceBattle.label: space battle
LanguageData.VEE_SpaceBattle.letterText: Several massive spaceships have engaged in combat in the planet’s orbit. Missed shots and debris can impact the ground in the area. This can lead to massive fires.
LanguageData.VEE_WildMenWanderIn.label: wild men wander in
